items.headline: अफ़ग़ानिस्तान का न्यूज़ीलैंड के ख़िलाफ़ टॉस जीतकर पहले बल्लेबाज़ी का फ़ैसला
whyItMatters: इमेज स्रोत, Joe Allison-ICC/ICC via Getty Images टी20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026 का चौथा मैच रविवार को अफ़ग़ानिस्तान और न्यूज़ीलैंड के बीच चेन्नई में खेला जा रहा है. अफ़ग़ानिस्तान ने टॉस जीतकर पहले बल्लेबाजी करने
summaryParagraphs: इमेज स्रोत, Joe Allison-ICC/ICC via Getty Images टी20 वर्ल्ड कप 2026 का चौथा मैच रविवार को अफ़ग़ानिस्तान और न्यूज़ीलैंड के बीच चेन्नई में खेला जा रहा है. अफ़ग़ानिस्तान ने टॉस जीतकर पहले बल्लेबाजी करने का फ़ैसला किया है. अफ़ग़ानिस्तान प्लेइंग इलेवन- रहमानउल्लाह गुरबाज़ (विकेटकीपर), इब्राहिम ज़दरान, सेदिकुल्लाह अटल, डरविश रसूली, अज़मतउल्लाह ओमरज़ाई, गुलबदीन नईब, मोहम्मद नबी, राशिद ख़ान (कप्तान), फ़ज़लहक़ फ़ारूक़ी, जियाउर रहमान, मुजीब उर रहमान न्यूज़ीलैंड प्लेइंग इलेवन- फ़िन ऐलन, टिम साइफ़र्ट (विकेटकीपर), रचिन रविंद्र, ग्लेन फ़िलिप्स, मार्क चैपमैन, डैरिल मिचेल, मिचेल सैंटनर (कप्तान), जिमी नीशम, मैट हेनरी, लॉकी फ़र्ग्युसन, जेकब डफ़ी. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Denied care, denied bail: Another Hindu leader dies in custody in Bangladesh
whyItMatters: UPDATED: Feb 8, 2026 10:50 IST Edited By: Sonali Verma Bangladesh’s prisons have claimed another life. Ramesh Chandra Sen, 86, a veteran Awami League leader, former minister, academic and parlia
summaryParagraphs: UPDATED: Feb 8, 2026 10:50 IST Edited By: Sonali Verma Bangladesh’s prisons have claimed another life. Ramesh Chandra Sen, 86, a veteran Awami League leader, former minister, academic and parliamentarian, died in judicial custody on Saturday night after spending nearly 18 months behind bars, battling failing health and a series of legal cases. His death has reopened questions about the treatment of political detainees and minorities in Bangladesh’s prison system. Just weeks earlier, on January 11, former Awami League leader and Hindu artist Pralay Chaki had also died during treatment while in custody. For Sen’s family, the loss was not sudden. “He kept telling us he was getting weaker. He asked for treatment. He asked for bail. Nothing worked,” a relative said. FROM PUBLIC LIFE TO PRISON CELL Eighteen months ago, Sen was still a respected public figure. A former member of the Awami League Presidium and Advisory Council, he had spent decades in politics and For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Andhra Pradesh along with other coastal states to lead India's blue economy mission: Jitendra Singh
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Union Minister of State for Science and Techno
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Union Minister of State for Science and Technology Jitendra Singh | Photo Credit: RAO GN Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology, Jitendra Singh, on Saturday, stated that Andhra Pradesh, along with other coastal states, will emerge as the torchbearer of India's Blue Economy transformation. Referring to the Prime Minister's repeated emphasis from the Red Fort on making the Blue Economy a national priority mission, the Minister said that the Union Budget 2026-27 gives concrete shape to this vision by placing fisheries, marine exports, coastal infrastructure, and ocean-based economic activity at the centre of India's long-term growth strategy. Addressing media representatives and social media influencers in Vijayawada, the Minister described the Union Budget 2026-27 as a strategic roadmap For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Israel says Netanyahu will meet with Trump on Wednesday about Iran talks
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu (Lef
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu (Left) and US President Donald Trump (Right) | Photo Credit: Jonathan Ernst Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu will meet with US President Donald Trump in Washington on Wednesday about the US talks with Iran, his office said Saturday, as concerns remain high about possible regional conflict. “The prime minister believes that all negotiations must include limiting the ballistic missiles and ending support for the Iranian axis,” Netanyahu's office said in a brief statement. The US and Iran held indirect talks on Friday in Oman that appeared to return to the starting point on how to approach discussions over Tehran's nuclear programme. Trump said the United States had “very good” talks and said more were planned for early next week. The US was represented by Mideast special envoy For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Shree Cements eyes Q4FY26 volume rebound, plans aggressive RMC expansion
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Shree Cements expects a strong rebound in ceme
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Shree Cements expects a strong rebound in cement volumes in the fourth quarter of the current financial year, aided by a pick-up in infrastructure activity and higher government spending towards the fiscal year-end, the management said in a Q3 analyst concall. The company is targeting sales volumes of 9-9.5 million tonne in the January-March quarter. It noted that the Centre’s push to utilise infrastructure allocations by March 31 is likely to support demand. While pricing remained a focus in the earlier part of the year, the company is now looking to ramp up capacity utilisation as volumes improve, an official said. Separately, Shree Cements outlined an aggressive expansion plan for its ready-mix concrete (RMC) business, with the company aiming to scale up its RMC footprint to 45 plants from the current 19 units over the next six to For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: India's message on terrorism is clear; no double standards, no compromise: PM Modi in Malaysia
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim shakes
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim shakes hands with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi, on the second day of Modi's official visit, in Putrajaya, Malaysia. | Photo Credit: REUTERS India and Malaysia on Sunday unveiled several initiatives to further shore up cooperation in areas of defence and security, semiconductor and trade after Prime Minister Narendra Modi held wide-ranging talks with his Malaysian counterpart Anwar Ibrahim. Following the meeting, Modi said India and Malaysia share a "special relationship" and both sides are committed to expanding their ties in diverse sectors. The prime minister also reiterated India's position on combating terrorism as he said: "Our message on terrorism is clear; no double standards, no compromise." Modi arrived in Kuala Lumpur on Saturday to a grand red-carpe For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 AP Energy Minister Gottipati Ravi Kumar switch
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 AP Energy Minister Gottipati Ravi Kumar switching on the lights after off-grid solar electrification at a remote tribal hamlet in Palutla region of Yerragondapalem in Prakasam district. Photo Credit: By Arrangement | Photo Credit: ARRANGEMENT Andhra Pradesh Energy Minister Gottipati Ravi Kumar launched an off-grid solar project to provide power to over 600 tribal households deep in the Nallamalla Forest, Prakasam district, at ₹3 crore. After learning that 611 tribal households in the Palutla region had been without electricity for decades, Kumar apprised Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu, who approved the off-grid solar initiative. "Kumar took personal initiative after the issue was brought to his notice during a constituency visit. As part of this initiative, solar power facilities with battery storage have been provided to 611 For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Pick of BL commodities - February 8, 2026
whyItMatters: The US-India trade deal hogged the limelight last week. The interim deal worked out during the weekend offers zero duty for select US farm goods. On the other hand, the deal will not lead to flooding
summaryParagraphs: The US-India trade deal hogged the limelight last week. The interim deal worked out during the weekend offers zero duty for select US farm goods. On the other hand, the deal will not lead to flooding of DDGS or red sorghum. The Indian budget proposals have a strategy to transform the agriculture sector via the cooperatives. Gold and silver were volatile last week and gave up a part of their gains made early this year. Silver prices dropped below $100 an ounce in China for the first time this year. Severe weather forecasts in India have improved by 30-40 per cent over the past decade. Sugar stocks in India were lower at the end of January despite higher production. India’s rice procurement is higher during the current procurement season and stocks are ample to meet any food emergency. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Business Line.

items.headline: Elon Musk denies Starlink phone: CEO says no device in works
whyItMatters: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet busines
summaryParagraphs: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet business's expansion ahead of a potential IPO. Musk has previously expressed strong reluctance towards phone manufacturing. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.
